_source: 日本年金機構 (Japan Pension Service) — FY2024 values

kokumin_nenkin._notes: 老齢基礎年金 — National/Basic Pension
kokumin_nenkin._notes_full: Full benefit for 40 years (480 months) of contributions as of 2024
kokumin_nenkin._notes_premium: FY2024 flat-rate monthly premium for self-employed/non-employed
kokumin_nenkin._notes_early: 0.4% reduction per month claimed before 65 (max 24% reduction at 60)
kokumin_nenkin._notes_deferral: 0.7% increase per month deferred past 65 (max 84% increase at 75)

kosei_nenkin._notes: 老齢厚生年金 — Employees' Pension Insurance
kosei_nenkin._notes_multiplier: Monthly benefit = Σ(standard monthly remuneration) × 0.005481. Standard remuneration is the月額 used for premium calculation.
kosei_nenkin._notes_pre2003: Pre-2003 formula used a different multiplier with a fixed 1.031 bonus rate
kosei_nenkin._notes_rate: Total 18.3% split equally — rate has been fixed since 2017
kosei_nenkin._notes_special: Special old-age pension (特別支給) may start at 61-64 for those born before certain dates

pension_income_deduction._notes: 公的年金等控除 — see also tax_brackets.json for full brackets. Minimum deductions:

deferral_break_even._notes: Approximate break-even years from deferral start age (ignoring tax effects)

_notes_totalization: Countries with social security totalization agreements (社会保障協定). Contribution periods can be combined to meet minimum eligibility. Check specific treaty for details.
